nodes.display: Skin and Soft Tissue Source Features
Skin or Soft Tissue Source Features
Do you have abdominal or stomach pain?
nodes.wording: Do you have abdominal or stomach pain?

nodes.display: Have you had chills or shaking?
nodes.wording: Have you had chills or shaking?

nodes.display: Have you or someone with you noticed new confusion, disorientation, or unusual drowsiness?
nodes.wording: Have you or someone with you noticed new confusion, disorientation, or unusual drowsiness?

nodes.display: Do you also have a cough?
nodes.wording: Do you also have a cough?

nodes.display: Have you had diarrhea or unusually loose stools?
nodes.wording: Have you had diarrhea or unusually loose stools?

nodes.display: How long have you had the fever or felt feverish?
nodes.wording: How long have you had the fever or felt feverish?

nodes.display: Are you having any difficulty breathing?
nodes.wording: Are you having any difficulty breathing?

nodes.display: Do you have a new or severe headache?
nodes.wording: Do you have a new or severe headache?

nodes.display: Do you have a condition or treatment that weakens your immune system?
nodes.wording: Do you have a condition or treatment that weakens your immune system?

nodes.display: Is your neck unusually stiff or painful to move?
nodes.wording: Is your neck unusually stiff or painful to move?

nodes.display: Do you have a new purple, rapidly spreading, or non-blanching rash that does not fade when pressed?
nodes.wording: Do you have a new purple, rapidly spreading, or non-blanching rash that does not fade when pressed?

nodes.display: Are you having extreme pain or discomfort anywhere?
nodes.wording: Are you having extreme pain or discomfort anywhere?

nodes.display: Have you been in close contact with anyone who has been ill?
nodes.wording: Have you been in close contact with anyone who has been ill?

nodes.display: Do you have a new painful red or swollen skin area, wound, or drainage?
nodes.wording: Do you have a new painful red or swollen skin area, wound, or drainage?

nodes.display: Do you have a sore throat?
nodes.wording: Do you have a sore throat?

nodes.display: Do you feel severely or unusually unwell overall?
nodes.wording: Do you feel severely or unusually unwell overall?

nodes.display: Have you measured your temperature, and what was the highest reading?
nodes.wording: Have you measured your temperature, and what was the highest reading?

nodes.display: Do you have pain or burning when urinating, urgency, or needing to urinate more often?
